component.name: Aetherion Astrophysics Suite
component.summary: Interactive black hole simulation and astrophysics research tool

description.p: Aetherion is an interactive astrophysics simulation and research suite built around general-relativistic black hole rendering. It provides a real-time GPU ray-marched 3D black hole with photorealistic accretion disk, a 2D orbital mechanics simulator, and a data analysis and object library for astrophysical objects.

ul.li: Real-time 3D black hole ray-marching with Schwarzschild metric
Photorealistic accretion disk with Doppler and gravitational redshift
2D orbital mechanics simulation with interactive parameters
Data analysis charts and astrophysical object library
Adjustable spin (Kerr parameter), mass, and camera controls
